title: Modulation
description: A growing collection of quality-of-life tweaks, bug fixes, and cross-mod integrations for modpack creators!
body: # Modulation **Modulation** is the home for all of my small features that aren't big enough to warrant having their own mods. It's a growing collection of quality-of-life tweaks, bug fixes, and cross-mod integrations for modpack creators. From fixing annoying vanilla quirks to adding new features to your favorite mods like [**Figura**](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) or [**Reconnectible Chains**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reconnectible-chains), Modulation has a module for you! It's completely modular as well: turn off anything you don't need, and tweak as you like. ### Check out the Wiki! For a full breakdown of every feature, how to configure the mod, and what each module does, please visit our **[Wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/modulation/latest/docs)**! ## License [![Assets license (ARR)](https://img.shields.io/badge/assets%20license-All%20Rights%20Reserved-red.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/evanbones/Field-Guide/blob/1.20.1/LICENSE) [![Code%20license%20(MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/evanbones/Field-Guide/blob/1.20.1/LICENSE) If you are thinking about using the code or assets from Modulation, please note the mod's licensing. All assets of Modulation are all rights reserved by their respective creators, unless specified otherwise. The source code of the mod is available under the MIT license. ## Credits Textures and ideas for the Reconnectible Chains module are from [Nekomaster](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nekomaster1000) and were originally created for use in his excellent modpack [Resurvival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/resurvival)! --- [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/6twDUSQBc4) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/github-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/evanbones/Modulation)
